agent_task.title: Failure-Oriented Continuation Stress Test Suite
agent_task.purpose: Test whether the inductive transformer continuation layer performs true trajectory continuation or only succeeds on simple/easy signals.
agent_task.core_directive: Try to break the continuation claim. Passing easy tests is not enough.

baseline_report.risk: disconnect metrics are near-perfect, so leakage, trivial signal dynamics, or overconstraint must be ruled out

non_negotiables: Do not change the model during testing
Do not tune thresholds after seeing results
Separate train, disconnect, recouple, and withheld phases
Log teacher and student streams per timestep

leakage_control.goal: prove student cannot access teacher during disconnect
checks: disable teacher-derived Signal X during disconnect unless computed only from student-internal views
assert no teacher_theta, teacher_amp, or teacher_omega used in student update
leakage_control.failure_condition: perfect disconnect alignment while any teacher-derived value is still accessible

shuffle_control.method: shuffle teacher phase stream during evaluation only
shuffle_control.failure_condition: high PLV remains after shuffled teacher comparison

untrained_control.method: run same protocol with untrained or reset student
untrained_control.failure_condition: untrained equals or beats trained on withheld/stress patterns

stress_tests.name: Long Disconnect Survival
stress_tests.purpose: Measure how long true continuation survives.

stress_tests.name: Frequency Shift During Disconnect
stress_tests.purpose: Check whether student can continue learned dynamics when teacher changes unseen.
stress_tests.interpretation: Student should not magically follow hidden teacher changes; failure to follow is acceptable and proves no leakage.

stress_tests.name: Multi-Band Signal
stress_tests.purpose: Test continuation beyond single clean rhythm.
stress_tests.success_condition: phase geometry remains coherent per dominant band and does not collapse into one groove.

stress_tests.name: Abrupt Phase Jump
stress_tests.purpose: Test lock breaking and recoupling behavior.

stress_tests.name: Noise Injection
stress_tests.purpose: Determine robustness against noisy EEG-like input.
stress_tests.success_condition: graceful degradation and no false TRUE CONTINUATION claims under severe noise.

stress_tests.name: Withheld Rhythm Generalization
stress_tests.purpose: Re-test old T3 weakness where untrained sometimes beat trained.
stress_tests.required_result: trained beats untrained on trajectory metrics, not just mismatch.

stress_tests.name: Groove Monopoly Test
stress_tests.purpose: Detect whether the system locks into one groove for everything.
stress_tests.failure_condition: one groove dominates across unrelated rhythms without corresponding phase-geometry improvement.

allowed_only_if: trained beats untrained on withheld/stress tests

if: works only on single-band clean signal
perfect scores appear under impossible hidden teacher changes

must_include: recommended next patch only if failure is diagnosed

agent_task.final_instruction: Do not improve the model during this run. This is validation only.
